I hope this message finds you well. My name is Ajay M, and I lead product development at Kaidemark Robotics. I am reaching out to discuss an exciting team opportunity within our warehouse robotics division that may be of interest to you.

We have achieved tremendous success with our recent initiatives and would welcome the chance to share our findings with you during a brief thirty-minute call next week. I believe the insights we have gathered could be mutually beneficial as we explore potential collaboration.

Please let me know your availability; any time between 2:00 AM and 5:00 AM works well on my end. I would be happy to accommodate a time that suits your schedule.
